name: prometheus-x-growth-operator
description: Operate the Prometheus-owned X/Twitter account’s research, content planning, scheduled posting, engagement strategy, and account-specific voice. Use only when explicitly named or when the user directly requests work for that account; do not auto-invoke for generic X browsing or writing.

resources.description: Checklist for each Prometheus X growth run.
Approval packet format for proposed Prometheus X posts and replies.
Starter examples of Prometheus X posts in the desired voice.
Suggested X search queries and target conversation areas.
Successful 2026-06-02 assisted Prometheus X growth workflow recipe with approval-packet boundaries and retry guardrails.
